sections.heading: Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing and using DevToolKit, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

sections.heading: Use of Service
sections.content: DevToolKit provides free online tools for developers, writers, designers, and students. You may use these tools for personal or commercial projects. Abuse, scraping, or trying to overload our servers is strictly prohibited.
